text: Hovering over the "upload image" button in the evaluate feedback form should show the tooltip "Attach image(s)"

proposedTasks.title: Add tooltip to image upload button in Evaluate feedback form
proposedTasks.description: In the Evaluate phase feedback submission form, the image-upload button should display a tooltip reading "Attach image(s)" on hover. Acceptance criteria: (1) Hovering over the upload-image button shows a tooltip with the text "Attach image(s)". (2) Tooltip appears after a short delay (~300ms) and disappears on mouse-out. (3) Tooltip is styled consistently with other tooltips in the application. (4) Tooltip is accessible (role="tooltip", aria-describedby on the button).

taskTitles: Add tooltip to image upload button in Evaluate feedback form
